events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need parse scenario. We have field-service visit, ADAS & post-repair calibration. Crew used field method less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment/note forbids. Reference material: OEM position statements. Need evaluate decision. Likely pass because method matches product instructions and project requirements, no prohibition. Risk maybe low/medium due less tidy but acceptable. Component conditions none. Need fill fields. Confidence high. Rationale: field method complies with OEM instructions and project specs, even if not shop-preferred; no safety or compliance violation observed. References: OEM service information/position statements. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 75? Need estimate. Value not asked, default 0. Sound source default empty string? Schema says string. workable empty list. order empty list. findings maybe note method less tidy but acceptable. actions none needed. Ensure raw JSON no markdown.
